# Meghtree Technologies — Cloud & AI Cost Intelligence

Meghtree Technologies is a Bangalore-based FinOps consultancy specializing in autonomous Azure cloud cost optimization, Kubernetes rightsizing, and AI spend governance. We help enterprises cut cloud bills by 30–60% through a layered FinOps framework.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://meghtree.co.in/) — Cloud & AI cost intelligence platform. Free 48-hour cost assessment. FinOps framework, AI spend governance, maturity model.
- [FAQ](https://meghtree.co.in/faq.html) — Frequently asked questions about FinOps, Azure cost optimization, Kubernetes rightsizing, and autonomous cloud savings.
- [Privacy Policy](https://meghtree.co.in/privacy.html) — Data protection practices compliant with India's DPDP Act 2023.
- [Terms of Service](https://meghtree.co.in/terms.html) — Terms governing website use and cloud optimization services.

## Core Services

- **Azure Cloud Cost Optimization** — Autonomous FinOps reducing Azure spend by 30–60%
- **Kubernetes Cost Reduction** — Namespace-level, pod-level cost attribution and rightsizing
- **AI FinOps & LLM Cost Governance** — Token-level cost tracking, GPU optimization, agentic AI workflow management
- **Free 48-Hour Cloud Cost Assessment** — Read-only analysis with personalized savings report
